strategy.name: SOL/BTC Lag Correlation Strategy
sources: Custom — based on observed BTC/SOL correlation with lag
strategy.description: BTC moves first, SOL follows with a multiplier effect and a delay. When BTC pumps but SOL hasn't caught up yet, that gap is the trade. Enter long SOL when BTC has moved significantly but SOL is lagging behind its expected ratio. Exit when SOL catches up or cut immediately if BTC crashes.

indicators.btc_change_15m: BTC % change over the last 15 minutes. The trigger signal.
indicators.btc_change_1h: BTC % change over the last 1 hour. Confirms sustained move, not a wick.
indicators.sol_change_15m: SOL % change over the last 15 minutes. Used to measure the lag.
indicators.sol_change_1h: SOL % change over the last 1 hour. Used to confirm SOL is underperforming.
indicators.btc_volume: BTC volume spike confirms the move is real, not a fake pump.
indicators.sol_rsi_5m: RSI(14) on 5m SOL chart. Avoid entering if already overbought above 75.

bullish: BTC has gained more than 0.8% in the last 15 minutes
BTC has gained more than 1.5% in the last 1 hour
SOL has gained less than 50% of what BTC has gained — lag confirmed
BTC move is supported by above-average volume — move is real
bearish_crash: BTC has dropped more than 1.5% in the last 15 minutes
BTC has dropped more than 3% in the last 1 hour

long: BTC 15m change is above +0.8% — BTC is moving up
BTC 1h change is above +1.5% — sustained move, not just a wick
SOL 15m change is less than half of BTC 15m change — SOL is lagging
SOL 1h change is less than BTC 1h change — lag confirmed on higher timeframe too
BTC volume in last 15m is above the 20-period average — move is real
SOL RSI(14) on 5m is below 75 — not already overbought
No active open position already running

exit_rules: PRIORITY EXIT — BTC drops more than 1.5% in any 15m candle while in trade: close immediately, SOL will drop harder
PRIORITY EXIT — BTC drops more than 3% in 1 hour while in trade: close immediately
Take profit when SOL has gained 2x what BTC gained from entry point — lag has closed
Take profit when SOL RSI(14) on 5m crosses above 80 — overbought, momentum exhausting
Time stop: if trade has been open more than 4 hours and not in profit, close it — lag trade failed
Hard stop loss: 2% below entry price — maximum loss per trade
risk_rules: Capital: 100 USDT with 3x leverage = 300 USDT position size maximum
Risk maximum 2% of capital per trade = $2 max loss before stop triggers
Maximum 3 trades per day — do not overtrade if first trades fail
Do not enter if BTC has already been rising for more than 2 hours — lag opportunity is gone
Do not enter if SOL has already moved more than BTC — you missed the trade
Do not enter during first 15 minutes after a BTC crash recovery — too volatile
If 2 consecutive stop losses hit in one day, stop trading for the rest of that day
Paper trade first — validate correlation holds before going live

crash_protection.description: BTC crash = SOL crashes harder and faster. This is the biggest risk.
rules: If BTC drops 1.5% or more in a single 15m candle: EXIT IMMEDIATELY, no questions
If BTC drops 3% or more in 1 hour: EXIT IMMEDIATELY
If BTC drops below its last 1h low while in trade: EXIT
Never hold a SOL long through a BTC red candle of more than 1%

notes: This strategy is based on the observed lag between BTC and SOL moves. BTC moves approximately 1x, SOL moves 2-3x with a delay. The edge is entering SOL during that delay window. The biggest risk is BTC reversing — SOL will fall harder and faster than BTC. Crash protection rules are mandatory. Cron should run every 5 minutes: */5 * * * *. Leverage: 3x maximum. Capital: start with 100 USDT, scale to 500 USDT only after 2+ weeks of profitable paper trading.
